headlines.title_cn: Why the rise of open source AI isn’t hurting Anthropic … yet
headlines.title_en: Why the rise of open source AI isn’t hurting Anthropic … yet
headlines.summary_cn: Open source models’ success isn’t coming at the expense of frontier labs. Instead, they each seem to capture two phases of the same life cycle.
headlines.summary_en: Open source models’ success isn’t coming at the expense of frontier labs. Instead, they each seem to capture two phases of the same life cycle.

items.title_cn: Discord admits AI moderation bug wrongfully banned users over harmless images
items.title_en: Discord admits AI moderation bug wrongfully banned users over harmless images
items.summary_cn: The company confirmed that the issue had been affecting accounts since May, with an additional 200 users banned over the weekend before its team identified and fixed the problem.
